use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and landing pages
Destructive action buttons with warning styling
Icon-only buttons for compact UI areas
Ghost-style buttons for secondary actions in toolbars
ai_summary: A versatile, production-ready Button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, class-variance-authority for maintainable styling, and Tailwind CSS. Includes accessibility features like focus-visible rings and disabled states. Suitable for any SaaS or web application requiring consistent button styling.
